bird.name: 黑腹火雀
bird.summary: 黑腹火雀（学名：Lagonosticta rara）是梅花雀科火雀属的一种，为非洲的常见物种。其全球活动范围有2,300,000平方千米。分布于贝宁、布基纳法索、喀麦隆、中非共和国、乍得、刚果民主共和国、科特迪瓦、加纳、几内亚、肯尼亚、利比里亚、尼日利亚、塞内加尔、塞拉利昂、苏…

locations.name: Orazio Antinori
locations.summary: Orazio Antinori (28 October 1811 – 26 August 1882) was an Italian explorer and zoologist.

relations.subject: 黑腹火雀
relations.evidence: The black-bellied firefinch (Lagonosticta rara) is a common species of estrildid finch found in Africa

relations.subject: 黑腹火雀
relations.evidence: It is native to the Guinean forest–savanna mosaic, the southern Sahel and northern Sudan (region)
